stemHtml: Which band is normally used for Aeronautical Mobile Service (AMS) voice communication? Select the most correct one…

options.a: The frequency band immediately below UHF of which 124 kHz is part of.
options.b: The frequency band immediately above MF of which 124 MHz is part of.
options.c: The two frequency bands just below UHF of which 50 MHz is part of.
options.d: The frequency band usually used is VLF.
